channel.title: +श्रीशैल-मल्लिकार्जुनः on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +श्रीशैल-मल्लिकार्जुनः on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: VIra mAheshvara takeover
item.description: Concerning the abrupt commencement of our extant inscriptional record at the Mallikarjuna Temple at Srisailam, Parabrahma Sastry (1994) suggests that the year 1313 marked a pivotal moment in which the governing authority of the Mallikarjuna Temple complex was transferred into the hands of the “Andhra Virasaivas,” as he terms them. Sastry even goes so far as to suggest that, as a characteristically violent religious community, the Virasaivas of Srisailam sought to exonerate their violent takeover of the Mallikarjuna Temple by expurgating the entire record of prior patronage on temple grounds.
